title: Pride & Groom Spot On For Dogs - 2x2 packs - Bundled by Smart Cutie
features: KEEP YOUR DOG PROTECTED -- Spot On Dogs is your furry friend's best defense against pesky parasites. Our easy-to-use spot-on treatment ensures your pet remains free from fleas, ticks, and other harmful pests.
EASY TO USE -- Spot on For Dogs is an insect repellent for amateur use to repel fleas and ticks by applying directly to the skin of dogs and puppies.
LONG LASTING EFFECT -- 4 vials each containing 1ml of geraniol solution which will provide protection for your dog on puppies for up to 4 weeks.
SAFE FOR YOUR PET -- Formulated to be safe for all dog breeds and age groups, ensuring your furry friend stays comfortable and happy.
Bundle contains: 2 packs Pride & Groom Spot On For Dogs Flea & Tick Repellent. Actual packaging may vary.
description: Product description Spot On Dogs is your furry friend's best defense against pesky parasites. Our easy-to-use spot-on treatment ensures your pet remains free from fleas, ticks, and other harmful pests.Spot on For Dogs is an insect repellent for amateur use to repel fleas and ticks by applying directly to the skin of dogs and puppies. 4 vials each containing 1ml of geraniol solution which will provide protection for your dog on puppies for up to 4 weeks. Formulated to be safe for all dog breeds and age groups, ensuring your furry friend stays comfortable and happy. Directions Avoid applying to the fur and do not massage skin immediately after application.
